title: Adding integrations to the 'workflows' beta
excerpt: Hey there!. If anyone is interested, I’m tasking a development team with building out integrations with specific other platforms, like Salesforce, Jira, etc. for the new ‘workflow’ builder feature, and we’re using this v…

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there!. If anyone is interested, I’m tasking a development team with building out integrations with specific other platforms, like Salesforce, Jira, etc. for the new ‘workflow’ builder feature, and we’re using this very short form to collect feedback on specific integrations that the community is interested in using. Your input would be very valuable! Also feel free to leave any feedback in this thread. Thanks!

posts.author: desmond.tatilian (Desmond)
posts.cookedHtml: How are you able to create a custom step for the workflow builder? I am also a developer and do not see this option and there is no documentation.

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there friend. There is a beta to join so that new feature type can be added to your account.

forms.monday.com

Build your own blocks | Closed beta registration | WorkForms

From requests, feedback to data collection and more. Turn your insights into action with customizable WorkForms.
